text: Flamethrower - allows the fire master to set a target on fire (if the battle is underwater, it can do serious damage to the enemy).
Triple Fireball - the fire master fires three projectiles every second.
Jet Flight - allows the firebender to temporarily fly into the air.
$(o)Condition:$() Within 16 blocks of lava/burning block or in the Nether.
Dragon Scale: Immune to fire and lava damage.
